titleStmt.title: Letter from John Joseph Cormack, 16 May 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: John Joseph Cormack

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from John Joseph Cormack (b. 1875), a physician from County Kilkenny. This letter concerns Cormack's car, which he has permission to use for travel in in north Kilkenny, south Tipperary and and Queen's County (Laois). In the letter Cormack requests that Thomas Renihan be allowed permission to purchase petrol. Cormack adds that a Sergeant Hannon will be happy to facilitate him in every way.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers, CSO RP/1916/8334/1

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
JOHNSTOWN CO KILKENNY 16√¢¬Ä¬îV√¢¬Ä¬î1916 Sir I have a special permit from Mr Marks D.S. RSC
Castlecorner to travel by Motor in North Kilkenny
South Tipperary and Queens County. As I engage
a car by agreement with Mr Thomas Renihan
the garage Johnstown Co Kilkenny in my professional
duties as Medical Certifier to the National Health
Insurance Commissioners (Ireland) and also in my
private practice, I respectfully ask permission that
he or I be allowed permission to purchase petrol for
that purpose. Sergeant Hannon R.S.C. Johnstown Co Kilkenny
will be only too happy to facilitate me in every way.
Thanking you in anticipation of an early reply. I am Sir
Your Obedient Servant John J. Cormack Ack. &reply that
permits for the purchase of
petrol are not issued from this
Dept.
I.J.T. 17.V.16.
